name: Metallica Minerals Limited
summary: Metallica Minerals Limited engages in the development, evaluation, and exploration of mineral properties in Australia. It explores for silica sands, bauxite, copper, gold, graphite, and limestone projects. The company holds interests in the Cape Flattery silica sands project covering an area of approximately 56 square kilometers located in Far North Queensland; Urquhart bauxite project situated on the west coast of Queensland's Cape York; Esmeralda graphite project covering an area of approximately 500 square kilometers located near Croydon in north Queensland; and Fairview limestone projects. Metallica Minerals Limited was founded in 1997 and is based in East Brisbane, Australia.
